mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) STARFORCE roster grows — 'StarForce - the Ortar has been defeated!' confirms Ortar (built OCBoss) is a Starforce-zone boss; Starforce now has Zuck + Gem Gem + Cracked Core + Ortar (Cracked Core + Ortar are already coded -> Starforce Zone is increasingly buildable from existing content). (2) UVUVWUWUWE meme boss confirmed live. (3) KEY/BOX-OPENED content — 'Undead Lair opened by <player>', 'Lucky box opened by <player>' (key-gated dungeon + lucky-box loot). (4) 'Instability!?' mechanic (a realm instability event — name only). (5) NODESTONE extraction ('extracted a normal nodestone' — D2 rune-material system live). (6) /16 star counter (death notifier [8/16, fame], [15/16, 2327]). (7) Identify-receipt + Special Crate recur. Server X1.0.1.
